products.title: Baby Tequila
products.body_html: We keep/grow our mushrooms under ATI Blue Plus and Reef Brite blue LED’s, nutrition is provided by Polyplab Reef Roids(although we seldom direct feed)  We achieve the best color and polyp size by providing a system with detectable PO4, NO3, and a DKH of 8(many polyps will respond poorly to high DKH, please take that into consideration).  low/moderate intermittent flow is very important to the health of our polyps.  WYSIWYG

products.title: Awesome Aussie Acan #10
products.body_html: We keep our Acans/Micros growing under Reef Brite LED’s and ATI Blue Plus T5’s, nutrition is provided by Polyplab Reef Roids.  Acans/Micros thrive in nutrient rich environments with detectable PO4, NO3, and a DKH of 8(many corals will respond poorly to high DKH, please take that into consideration).  It is our experience that most Acans/Micros do best in low light(less than 75 PAR).  Rainbow Acans can and often do change colors under different light.  WYSIWYG

products.body_html: We keep our Chalice growing under Ecotech Radion LED’s, nutrition is provided by Polyplab Reef Roids and/or LRS frozen foods.  Chalice thrive in nutrient rich environments with detectable PO4, NO3, and a DKH of 8(many corals will respond poorly to high DKH, please take that into consideration).  It is our experience that most chalice do best in low light(less than 75 PAR).  WYSIWYG

products.title: Gonzos XXX Goniopora/Bernardapora
products.body_html: We keep our Goniopora/Alveopora growing under ATI Blue Plus and Reef Brite blue LED’s, nutrition is provided by Polyplab Reef Roids.  Goniopora/Alveopora thrive in nutrient rich environments with detectable PO4, NO3, and a DKH of 8(many corals will respond poorly to high DKH, please take that into consideration).  LOW ON MANGANESE?  Consider testing and adding accordingly!!! WYSIWYG
